name.value: Hematite Cougar Figurine of Wondrous Power

description.value: Price 10,000 gp; Slot none; CL 11th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration and transmutation DESCRIPTION This palm-sized figurine of a cat with a spiked tail is made of gleaming hematite. A hematite cougar turns into a digmaul that is fully obedient to the figurine’s owner. Even in its animated form, the hematite cougar is made of dense metal, granting it a +2 armor bonus to AC and a +2 bonus to its CMD. An animated hematite cougar conducts low levels of electricity; creatures adjacent to the hematite cougar gain electricity resistance 2, but any damage prevented by this ability is dealt to the hematite cougar instead. A hematite cougar can be animated twice per week for up to 8 hours per use; speaking the command word before the 8 hours expires returns the hematite cougar to a figurine. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells animate objects, resist energy
